user_query: I'm interested in earthquakes and want to stay updated. Please give me the latest top 15 earthquakes felt by locals and the latest top 15 earthquakes overall. Additionally, provide me with the current snow conditions of Jackson Hole ski resort.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest top 15 earthquakes felt by locals.
Fetch the latest top 15 overall earthquakes.
Retrieve current snow conditions of Jackson Hole ski resort.
